title: The Thornveil Lowlands
content: The Thornveil Lowlands stretch south from the Merchant Quarter, a patchwork of muddy pastures and thorn-hedged lanes. Travellers on the main road between settlements keep one hand on their coin-purse and the other near their weapon. Bandit ambushes are common enough that the Merchant Guild posts bounties on a rotating board outside the factor's office. The land is flat and open, offering little cover — fights here favour those who strike first.
